creator: glen.j.barber@gmail.com
text:
Sorry for the noise.

I apparently have had one of my little moments and I now realize why
the package is failing -- it is a MS .zip file containing .exe files.

If I am able to find another source package for this (and a correct
one at that), I will submit a new patch.  This PR can be closed due to
an obvious submitter burnout.

Thanks.

-- 
Glen Barber
